administration/authentication/manage-pro.title: Manage Providers

administration/authentication/saml-setup.description: Click the "Add Method" button and select "SAML 2.0".

administration/enterprise-features/exter.description: External services represent third-party APIs such as payment gateways, messaging platforms, or analytics services.

administration/enterprise-features/exter.title: Secrets Management
administration/enterprise-features/exter.description: Secrets Management allows you to securely store one-time or reusable secrets in a vault. These secrets can be accessed securely at runtime without hardcoding them in your application code or exposing them in configuration files.

administration/enterprise-features/logs-.description: Configure output destinations for your logs: Splunk, HTTP endpoints, Syslog servers, or Elasticsearch.

administration/enterprise-features/logs-.title: Splunk
administration/enterprise-features/logs-.description: Connect to your Splunk instance via HTTP Event Collector.

administration/enterprise-features/logs-.title: Syslog
administration/enterprise-features/logs-.description: Stream logs to your Syslog server via UDP or TCP.

autonomous-agents/best-practices.title: Security Best Practices
autonomous-agents/best-practices.description: This guide outlines recommended security practices for M2M authentication deployments with AuthSec, covering credential management, access control, network security, monitoring, and incident response.

autonomous-agents/configure-workload.title: Configure Autonomous Workload
autonomous-agents/configure-workload.description: This guide walks through registering an autonomous agent as a client application in AuthSec and configuring the OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow for M2M authentication.

autonomous-agents/integrate-spire.description: This guide covers deploying and configuring SPIRE (SPIFFE Runtime Environment) with AuthSec for automatic workload identity management and certificate rotation.
